_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-22 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Strike interval is an approximation — verify actual listed strikes in Kite option chain. No lot size shown (not available from any live source) — figures are per-share, not total cost. ⚠ LIQUIDITY UNVERIFIED — no open-interest or bid-ask data exists anywhere in this system; this strike is chosen by moneyness only and may be thin or wide-spread. Check the live option chain before assuming it's fillable near this premium.
ICICIBANK.commentary: BUY_CE (4/6 votes): price 1453.0 is above EMA18 (1412.85) and EMA50 (1362.72) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (31.37) is above its signal line (28.99) -- bullish momentum (+1 CE) | price broke below pivot support S1 (1455.17) -- breakdown confirmed (+2 PE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 2.6%) is strongly positive (+1 CE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.

NESTLEIND.name: NESTLEIND
NESTLEIND.data_warning: ℹ 6/6 still gets the same capped-risk spread as every other vote level, not extra exposure — this system's own 3-year backtest found the old "6-vote = single-leg" rule was actually its worst-performing bucket (39.7% win, Sharpe 2.71 vs 41.9-45.3% win, Sharpe 3.0-4.8 for spreads). Don't read '6/6' as higher conviction than a 4/6 or 5/6 signal. Signals based on 2026-07-22 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Strike interval is an approximation — verify actual listed strikes in Kite option chain. No lot size shown (not available from any live source) — figures are per-share, not total cost. ⚠ LIQUIDITY UNVERIFIED — no open-interest or bid-ask data exists anywhere in this system; this strike is chosen by moneyness only and may be thin or wide-spread. Check the live option chain before assuming it's fillable near this premium.
NESTLEIND.commentary: BUY_CE (6/6 votes): price 1471.5 is above EMA18 (1434.12) and EMA50 (1410.89) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (10.97) is above its signal line (10.11) -- bullish momentum (+1 CE) | price broke above pivot resistance R1 (1461.33) -- breakout confirmed (+2 CE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 3.11%) is strongly positive (+1 CE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations.
